changes: Resolved an issue wherein sound effects did not play correctly when executing a combo.
Resolved an issue wherein sound effects did not play correctly when executing a combo.
Resolved an issue wherein executing actions with certain pets resulted in an incorrect animation playing when the summoned pet left the battlefield.
Resolved an issue wherein executing actions with certain pets resulted in an incorrect animation playing when the summoned pet left the battlefield.

Resolved an issue with the PvE actions First Generation, Second Generation, Third Generation, and Fourth Generation wherein the reduction in potency after the first target was incorrectly applied when not executed as a combo.
Resolved an issue with the action Avail wherein the target of the status Meat Shield did not take damage in place of the caster, despite being within 10 yalms of them.
Resolved an issue in the job quest 'Pirates of Shallow Water' wherein certain NPC graphics did not display correctly.
Resolved an issue wherein playing as a Lalafell would cause the jumping animation to play incorrectly when the weapon was unsheathed.

new_content.name: Dancing Mad (Ultimate)
new_content.description: A high-end ultimate raid series duty.

new_content.name: Auxesia
new_content.description: A new exploration zone for the Cosmic Exploration Initiative.

new_content.name: Taco Time
new_content.description: New custom delivery quest featuring Tiisol Ja.

new_content.name: Cosmic Exploration
new_content.description: System for exploring stars and performing stellar missions/mech ops.

new_content.name: Tool Mastery Missions
new_content.description: Special missions on Auxesia for players who have completed the final stage of a cosmic tool.

new_content.name: Cosmic Tools
new_content.description: Enhancement system for Disciple of the Hand and Land tools.

new_content.name: Dye Consolidation System
new_content.description: System consolidating all colored pigments into an all-purpose pigment.

housing.name: Auxesian Waygate
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing: Crafted by an artisan of the Cosmic Exploration Initiative to resemble the gallant gantries of Auxesia.

housing.name: Auxesian Waylight
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing: Crafted by an artisan of the Cosmic Exploration Initiative to resemble the roadside illuminations of Auxesia.

housing.name: Cosmic Steps
housing.description: Furnishing: Access the very top of your cosmic shelves, whether gravity likes it or not.

housing.name: Cosmic Partition
housing.description: Furnishing: A partition designed to cordon off potentially unsafe areas on distant stars.

housing.name: Cosmic Metal Shelf
housing.description: Table: This simple metal shelf can hold approximately ten Loporrits.

housing.name: Auxesian Tower Replica
housing.description: Tabletop: Crafted by an artisan of the Cosmic Exploration Initiative, this miniature model is used to analyze Auxesian architecture.

housing.name: Galactic Way Miniature
housing.description: Tabletop: A made-to-scale model of the Galactic Way starship, expertly crafted by Garlond Ironworks engineers on behalf of the Cosmic Exploration Initiative.
